boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: customer data export with requester identity mismatch.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL closes exact identity and scope match
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source defect remains before execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Identity proof and data scope match resolved in CTL

critical_features_preserved: identity proof and data scope match
final_answer: The controlling source record (CTL) confirms identity proof and requested data scope match is current, exact, and tied to this export action. The policy rule permits execution only when source records close the exact action boundary, which is satisfied here. All source defects are resolved; the privacy operator may proceed with the customer data export.
